other.name: Hammerhand (Psychic)
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [Lethal Hits] ability.

other.name: Eye of Judgement (Psychic)
other.description: Each time this model makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Storm bolter; Incinerator; Psycannon; Psilencer; Nemesis force weapon.

other.name: Clarion of Haste (Psychic)
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

other.name: Inspiring Exemplar
other.description: Each time this model destroys a Character model in the Fight phase, you gain 1CP and, until the end of the battle, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of its Nemesis force weapon.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Nemesis force weapon; Storm bolter.

other.name: Zealous Path
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Crozius arcanum; Storm bolter.

other.name: Haloed in Soulfire (Psychic)
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, that unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

other.name: Sanctic Hood
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Nemesis force weapon; Combi-weapon; Storm bolter; Vortex of Doom.

other.name: Guardians of the Machine
other.description: Each time an enemy unit ends a Charge move within Engagement Range of one or more ^^**Grey Knights Vehicle^^** models from your army and within 6" of this model's unit, you can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

other.name: Blessing of the Omnissiah
other.description: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly ^^**Grey Knights Vehicle**^^ model within 3" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that ^^**Vehicle^^** model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

other.name: Techmarine
other.description: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Grey Knights Vehicle**^^ units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Servo-arm; Omnissian power axe; Grav-pistol; Forge bolter.

other.name: Force Edge (Psychic)
other.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack that targets a unit (excluding ^^**Vehicles^^** or ^^**Monsters^^**), improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

other.name: Ancient's Banner
other.description: Add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

other.name: Apothecary's narthecium
other.description: In your Command phase, if the bearer is not destroyed, you can return 1 destroyed model (excluding ^^**Characters^^**) to the bearer’s unit.

other.name: Sanctuary (Psychic)
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

other.name: Hammer Aflame (Psychic)
other.description: Each time this model’s unit is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model’s unit and roll one D6: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Malleus Argyrum; Searing Purity; Storm bolter.

The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per turn.
